evals.expected_output: A .http file named debug-company-list.http in the project root containing @baseUrl/@token variables, GET request to /admin/debug/companies-list with pagination query params and Authorization header, and a comment documenting the available filters.

assertions.name: includes-pagination-params
assertions.description: URL includes per_page and page query params

assertions.name: documents-filters-in-comment
assertions.description: Comment line documents available filters: id, cnpj, business_name, per_page, page

evals.expected_output: A .http file with a PATCH request to /admin/debug/plan-subscription, Authorization and Content-Type: application/json headers, and a JSON body with plan_subscription_id and plan_id fields.

assertions.name: json-body-has-plan-subscription-id
assertions.description: JSON body contains the plan_subscription_id field

assertions.name: json-body-has-plan-id
assertions.description: JSON body contains the plan_id field

evals.expected_output: A .http file covering both routes: GET /admin/debug/invoice-service-details and GET /admin/debug/invoice-service-details/tomador-types, each with Authorization header, separated by ###.

assertions.name: both-routes-have-auth-header
assertions.description: Both request blocks include Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

assertions.name: uses-multiple-separators
assertions.description: File contains at least two ### separators for two separate request blocks
